# Hostrig

> Hostrig is an opinionated self-hosted PaaS on k3s: typed services (web, worker, Postgres, Redis), gVisor for user apps, git push-to-deploy, platform wildcard URLs via Traefik + edge. Interfaces: Web dashboard, MCP, and thin CLI. Never a desktop app or Coolify-style feature matrix.

## Docs
- [Introduction](https://hostrig.com/docs/): What Hostrig is and is not
- [Prerequisites](https://hostrig.com/docs/getting-started/prerequisites/): What you need before install
- [Quick start](https://hostrig.com/docs/getting-started/quick-start/): Install control plane, connect k3s, first deploy
- [Scope](https://hostrig.com/docs/concepts/scope/): In and out of scope
- [Architecture](https://hostrig.com/docs/concepts/architecture/): Control plane, k3s, data plane
- [Projects & services](https://hostrig.com/docs/concepts/projects/): Service-first model
- [Security](https://hostrig.com/docs/concepts/security/): gVisor, NetworkPolicy, honest limits
- [Cluster](https://hostrig.com/docs/guides/cluster/): Connect or create k3s
- [Domains](https://hostrig.com/docs/guides/domains/): Platform wildcards and edge TLS
- [Deploy](https://hostrig.com/docs/guides/deploy/): Build and ship
- [Bindings & secrets](https://hostrig.com/docs/guides/secrets/): Explicit DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL
- [MCP for agents](https://hostrig.com/docs/guides/mcp/): /api/mcp tools and tokens
- [CLI](https://hostrig.com/docs/guides/cli/): Thin hostrig client (same PATs)
- [Observe](https://hostrig.com/docs/guides/observe/): Optional Sentry-compatible + OTLP
- [Environment](https://hostrig.com/docs/reference/environment/): Config reference

## Product pages
- [Home](https://hostrig.com/)
- [Pricing](https://hostrig.com/pricing/): Hobby $0 forever self-hosted
